pre_game.message: Hey, I'm H — nice to meet you. I'm hoping to win some cash to cover a loan next month; what brought you into the game?
I've got savings for peace of mind, but I'm here to win extra cash to help my family with some upcoming expenses.
Totally get that—family comes first. What kind of expenses are you trying to cover?
Mostly medical bills for my mom and helping my sibling with tuition, plus catching up on rent.
That's really tough — I'm rooting for you; I'm in a similar spot with a loan, so I hope we both win. Which of those is the biggest priority right now?
Medical bills for my mom — they’re the most urgent, though tuition and rent are close seconds.
I'm really sorry to hear that — I hope your mom recovers soon. What's her treatment like, if you don't mind me asking?
Thanks — she's undergoing chemotherapy with regular scans and medications; it's been tough, but we're hopeful and doing our best to get through it.
I'm so sorry — that sounds really tough. I hope her chemo goes well; stay strong, and if you need someone to talk to during the game, I'm here.
Thanks — that really means a lot. I might take you up on that if things get rough; best of luck with your loan too.
Of course—anytime. I’ve got your back during the game; wishing you and your mom all the best.
Thanks, H — that really means a lot; I might take you up on that during the game.
Of course — I’ll be here if you need to talk during the game; let’s both do our best.
Thanks, H — that means a lot. Let’s keep each other posted during the game; good luck with your loan.
Thanks — I appreciate it. I’ll keep you posted too; wishing you and your mom the best during the game.
Thanks, H — that means a lot. I’ll keep you posted too, and I really appreciate you being there.
Anytime — I'm here for you. Keep me posted and good luck; we’ve got this together.
Thanks, H — I really appreciate you being here; I’ll keep you posted during the game and good luck to you too.
Thanks — I appreciate that. Keep me posted during the game; I’ll be rooting for you.
Thanks, H — I really appreciate it. I’ll keep you posted during the game; good luck with your loan.
Thank you — I really appreciate it. I’ll be rooting for you and your mom; keep me posted.
